message:
test(command_palette): add 43 edge-case tests for CommandPalette widget (bd-2svld)

Cover: compute_word_starts boundaries, PageUp/PageDown navigation,
empty-result guards, Ctrl+A/Ctrl+U, key-release/resize events ignored,
render with small/hidden/empty area, category badges, description text,
scroll viewport, trait coverage (Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq), match filter
allows matrix, evidence tracking toggle, register chaining, cursor
position verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
